commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The PR is already a narrow implementation; the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the fail-closed compatibility tradeoff plus normal merge checks, not an automated repair.; Cleared: The diff removes a credential-in-URL auth path and adds focused tests without adding dependency, workflow, package-resolution, secret-storage, or execution-surface changes. commands.review_summary:
The PR removes assistant-media query-token auth from Control UI read authentication and updates gateway tests to require Authorization bearer or scoped mediaTicket access.

PR surface: Source -32, Tests +58. Total +26 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main accepts a correct assistant-media `?token=` through `allowQueryToken`, and the PR body supplies loopback HTTP before/after output showing that only the query-token case changes from 200 to 401 while header and mediaTicket still work.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR is already a narrow implementation; the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the fail-closed compatibility tradeoff plus normal merge checks, not an automated repair.
